# DampedSpring { #paleobeasts.DampedSpring }

```python
DampedSpring(
    forcing=None,
    var_name='damped_spring',
    m=1.0,
    k=1.0,
    c=0.1,
    state_variables=None,
    diagnostic_variables=None,
    *args,
    **kwargs,
)
```

Damped (and optionally driven) spring-mass oscillator.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name                 | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                     | Default           |
|----------------------|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| forcing              |        | Optional external driving force F(t).  Pass a ``Forcing`` object; ``get_forcing(t)`` should return force in Newtons.  If ``None``, the undriven damped oscillator is simulated. | `None`            |
| var_name             |        | Human-readable label for the model.                                                                                                                                             | `'damped_spring'` |
| m                    |        | Mass in kg.  Must be > 0.                                                                                                                                                       | `1.0`             |
| k                    |        | Spring constant in N/m.  Must be > 0.                                                                                                                                           | `1.0`             |
| c                    |        | Linear damping coefficient in N·s/m.  ``c=0`` gives undamped SHM; ``c < 2*sqrt(k*m)`` gives underdamped (oscillatory) decay.                                                    | `0.1`             |
| state_variables      |        | Names for the two integrated state variables (position, velocity).                                                                                                              | `None`            |
| diagnostic_variables |        | Names for post-integration diagnostics.                                                                                                                                         | `None`            |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [damping_ratio](#paleobeasts.DampedSpring.damping_ratio) | Return ζ = c / (2√(km)).  ζ<1 underdamped, ζ=1 critical, ζ>1 overdamped. |
| [natural_frequency](#paleobeasts.DampedSpring.natural_frequency) | Return ω₀ = √(k/m) in rad/s (uses current param_values). |
| [natural_period](#paleobeasts.DampedSpring.natural_period) | Return T₀ = 2π/ω₀ in seconds (uses current param_values). |

### damping_ratio { #paleobeasts.DampedSpring.damping_ratio }

```python
DampedSpring.damping_ratio()
```

Return ζ = c / (2√(km)).  ζ<1 underdamped, ζ=1 critical, ζ>1 overdamped.

### natural_frequency { #paleobeasts.DampedSpring.natural_frequency }

```python
DampedSpring.natural_frequency()
```

Return ω₀ = √(k/m) in rad/s (uses current param_values).

### natural_period { #paleobeasts.DampedSpring.natural_period }

```python
DampedSpring.natural_period()
```

Return T₀ = 2π/ω₀ in seconds (uses current param_values).
